channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Toronto Councillor and TTC Chair Howard Moscoe Dies at 86
item.description: Howard Moscoe, a well-known figure in Toronto municipal politics and former chair of the Toronto Transit Commission (TTC), has died at the age of 86. His passing was reported on May 23, 2026, promptin...

item.title: Explosion reported near railway track in Quetta; police and rescue teams respond
item.description: A loud explosion was reported in Quetta on Sunday, according to police officials. The incident occurred near a railway track within the city, prompting an immediate response from law enforcement and r...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk says Ladakh constitutional safeguard talks are ongoing after Centre meeting
item.description: Environmentalist and social reformer Sonam Wangchuk has said that discussions regarding constitutional safeguards for Ladakh under Article 371 are still ongoing and should be seen as a gradual process...

item.title: Automaker recalls nearly 17,000 vehicles in Canada over potential crash risk
item.description: An automaker has issued a recall affecting nearly 17,000 vehicles in Canada because of a safety-related defect that could increase the risk of a crash. The CTV News report states that the recall was a...

item.title: Alberta referendum question on potential separation from Canada revealed
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has announced a referendum question that could open the door to the province beginning the legal process for possible separation from Canada, intensifying long-standing ...

item.title: NSW launches Migrant Workers Centre to support temporary visa holders facing exploitation and underpayment
item.description: Temporary visa holders in New South Wales now have access to a dedicated Migrant Workers Centre designed to support those experiencing workplace exploitation, unsafe conditions and underpayment. The i...

item.title: UK set for early summer heatwave as temperatures approach May records
item.description: A spell of unusually hot weather is affecting the United Kingdom, with meteorologists indicating that a heatwave is likely to be officially declared in parts of the country as temperatures continue to...

item.title: US immigration policy change requires Green Card applicants to complete processing outside the United States, affecting Nigerian migrants
item.description: The United States government under President Donald Trump has introduced a major change to its immigration system that affects how foreign nationals apply for permanent residency. According to the dir...

item.title: Remembering publisher Krishan Chopra and his lasting impact on Indian publishing

item.title: Key Nigerian Newspaper Headlines: Sunday 24 May 2026 Roundup
item.description: This Naija News roundup brings together the major developments making headlines across Nigeria on Sunday, 24th May, 2026. In politics, the All Progressives Congress (APC) continues its preparations fo...

item.title: Disputes Over Renewable Energy Permits Threaten Bipartisan Permitting Reform Effort in Congress
item.description: A report published by Politico and highlighted by Raw Story states that ongoing disputes over renewable energy policy within the Trump administration are threatening bipartisan negotiations on permitt...

item.title: Pakistan strengthens airport screening and preparedness measures amid Ebola outbreak in Africa
item.description: Pakistan has enhanced its preventive health measures at all major airports in response to the recent Ebola outbreak in Africa, according to the Ministry of Health. The move comes after the World Healt...

item.title: Debate over ASI restrictions on Red Fort tour guides and control of historical interpretation in India

item.title: Brent Manalo explores his musical identity in ‘Lover Boy’
item.description: Brent Manalo is featured in an exclusive entertainment music article highlighting his creative journey and evolving sound through his project titled ‘Lover Boy’. The piece focuses on how the artist is...

item.title: Understanding Vitamin B12: benefits, deficiency risks, and whether high levels are linked to cancer
item.description: Vitamin B12 (cobalamin) is an essential nutrient required for the production of red blood cells, proper functioning of the nervous system, and accurate DNA replication and repair. It is naturally foun...

item.title: Linus Torvalds Says AI Is Increasing Linux Kernel Development and Bug Reports
item.description: During the Linux Foundation's Open Source Summit North America, Linux creator Linus Torvalds discussed how artificial intelligence tools are changing Linux kernel development and bug discovery. Accord...

item.title: Authorities warn of potential blast impact zones at Garden Grove aerospace facility amid chemical tank crisis
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, have released new details outlining the potential impact zones if a damaged chemical tank at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove were to explode. According ...

item.title: McBurnie’s stoppage-time goal secures Hull City promotion to the Premier League after playoff final win
item.description: Hull City have secured a dramatic return to the English Premier League after defeating Middlesbrough 1-0 in the Championship playoff final held at Wembley Stadium. The decisive moment of the match cam...

item.title: Behind-the-scenes promotional stills of Mel Gibson as William Wallace in Braveheart (1995)

item.title: Joshua Garcia shares discomfort with on-camera skin exposure, prefers modest roles
item.description: Actor Joshua Garcia has openly shared his personal comfort level when it comes to acting roles that require him to show more skin on camera. In a recent interview, he admitted that he finds such scene...
